infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SmartDocket needs camera access to scan your grocery receipts
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SmartDocket needs photo library access to import receipt images
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SmartDocket uses your location to find nearby supermarkets and show you the best local deals. For example, we detect stores like Tesco, Lidl and Aldi near you.
